nodes.name: 朝鮮 (地區)
nodes.summary: 朝鮮 (地區)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联39种鸟类，包括丹顶鹤、朱鹮、黑琴鸡等39种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Strumpshaw Fen RSPB reserve
nodes.summary: Strumpshaw Fen RSPB reserve是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括縱紋腹小鴞，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 縱紋腹小鴞
nodes.summary: 縱紋腹小鴞（Little owl，学名 Athene noctua），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: 01.jpg | image_caption = | image2 = Athene noctua - Little Owl XC309481.mp3 | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | status2 = CITES_A2 | status2_system = CITES | status2_ref = | genus = Athene | species = noctua | authority = (Scopoli, 1769) | synonyms = Carine noctua | range_map = AtheneNoctuaIUCN.svg | range_map_caption = Range of the little owl }} thumb|3D scan of little owl skeleton The little owl (Athene noctua), also known as the owl of Athena or owl of Minerva, is a bird that inhabits much of the temperate and warmer parts of Europe, the Palearctic east to Korea, and North Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: (Strumpshaw Fen RSPB reserve, Norfolk)]] This is a sedentary species that is found in open countryside in a great range of habitats
